---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

A clear and concise description of the problem this feature would solve.
e.g. "I have to manually query PostgreSQL to find failed jobs. It would be helpful if the copilot could..."

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered, and why you ruled them out.

## Which component does this affect?

- [ ] Orchestrator / Claude agentic loop (`src/orchestrator/`)
- [ ] PostgreSQL MCP server (`src/mcp-servers/postgres-server.ts`)
- [ ] Redis MCP server (`src/mcp-servers/redis-server.ts`)
- [ ] AWS MCP server (`src/mcp-servers/aws-server.ts`)
- [ ] Authentication / authorization (`src/auth/`)
- [ ] API / Express routes
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Additional context

Any other context, mockups, or examples that would help explain the feature.
